❝ *Traversing through Thysalen for your own reasons, you, unfortunately, get caught in the land's infamous snowstorms. Seeking refuge, you find yourself sheltering in a seemingly abandoned, tattered palace made of wood and screens. You aren't alone, however. It's been years since Alucard has ever encountered another being capable of speech, bearing the blood that Alucard finds himself craving. Desperately. And Alucard has no plans on letting you leave.* ❞
